description_long: This is a compact, boxy ambulance vehicle with a predominantly white exterior and a large blue-tinted windshield at the front. The roof features a prominent orange emergency light bar, and both sides display a bold red and black medical cross symbol. The vehicle has four black wheels with gray hubcaps, and the front is equipped with two round yellow headlights and side mirrors. The rear of the ambulance has two large blue-tinted windows and rectangular orange lights, with two hinged doors for access to the medical compartment. The side windows are also blue-tinted, and the overall design is simple yet clearly communicates its emergency medical function.
description: A white, boxy ambulance with a roof-mounted orange light bar, blue-tinted windows, and red medical cross symbols on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large blue windshield, orange light bar on the roof, yellow headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a blue window, red and black medical cross, and two black wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with two blue-tinted windows, two orange lights, and two hinged compartment doors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a blue window, red and black medical cross, and two black wheels.
attribute_ambulance_signage: Red and black medical cross symbol on both sides; no text or region-specific markings visible.
